1.title: Share the Love
1.description: This lovely badge was earned by users who shared their favorite Twitch clips in February 2025.

1.title: Direct Relief - Charity 2018
1.description: Supported their favorite streamer during the 2018 Blizzard of Bits

1.title: Twitch Recap 2024
1.description: The Official Chat Badge of the Year. It takes hard work and KomodoHype to receive it. You should be proud to tell everyone you know about this.

1.title: GLHF Pledge
1.description: Signed the GLHF pledge in support for inclusive gaming communities
